creator: starikov@caotus.ru
text:
Fail to install emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3 because of incompatibility between this port and standard emulated in FreeBSD Linux kernel.

# cd /usr/ports/emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3
# make
===>  linux_dist-gentoo-stage3-2008.0 linuxulator is not (kld)loaded.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3.
# kldload linux
[root@mx4 /usr/ports/emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3]# make
===>  linux_dist-gentoo-stage3-2008.0 compat.linux.osrelease: 2.4.2 is not supported.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/emulators/linux_dist-gentoo-stage3.
